response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio for 'Tsumi to Batsu' is a modified cover with English rap sections and a unique arrangement; the reference JSON provided the core Japanese lyrics, but manual transcription was required for the additions. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were used for the main chorus and verses, but ignored for the ad-libs, rap verses, and the entirety of the post-performance talk segment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions during the rapid song sections to prevent cascading delays, and timed conversational blocks to the exact vocal bursts in the talk segment.

subtitles.original: どこまで行っても一番のお姫様 行くよ 3, 2, 1
subtitles.english: No matter how far we go, I'm the #1 princess. Here we go! 3, 2, 1

subtitles.original: That's on you 見せてあげる
subtitles.english: That's on you, I'll show you.

subtitles.original: 周りない So in despair
subtitles.english: With no surroundings, so in despair.

subtitles.original: 薔薇のタトゥー口移し流し込む罪の味
subtitles.english: Mouth-to-mouth with a rose tattoo, pouring in the taste of sin.

subtitles.original: 共犯ね これであなたは
subtitles.english: We're accomplices. Now you...

subtitles.original: あたしに あたしに あたしに
subtitles.english: ...to me, to me, to me...

subtitles.original: 相応しい人になりました
subtitles.english: ...have become the perfect person.

subtitles.english: I love you, my boy!

subtitles.english: With 'I love', you and I, sin and punishment.

subtitles.english: I love you, my God!

subtitles.english: I love you, my boy!

subtitles.original: その味知る前には戻れない
subtitles.english: I can't go back to before I knew that taste.

subtitles.original: 愛してみて どうかこの僕を
subtitles.english: Please, try to love me.

subtitles.original: 愛してみて どうかこのあたしを
subtitles.english: Please, try to love me.

subtitles.original: 君 君 君 君だ！
subtitles.english: It's you, you, you, you!

subtitles.original: Hey! Hey! Come on everybody! All right!
subtitles.english: Hey! Hey! Come on everybody! All right!

subtitles.original: 皆さん Welcome、SyudouさんとCalliope 3D Birthday Live!
subtitles.english: Welcome everyone, to Syudou and Calliope's 3D Birthday Live!

subtitles.original: 壊し合うように 癒し合うように
subtitles.english: As if breaking each other, as if healing each other.

subtitles.original: 求め合ってしまうのよ しょうがないじゃない
subtitles.english: We end up wanting each other, it can't be helped, right?

subtitles.original: 与えられた天国より選んだ地獄
subtitles.english: Better the hell we chose than the heaven we were given.

subtitles.original: あなたと二人ならどこまで...！
subtitles.english: If it's with you, then no matter how far...!

subtitles.original: I love you, my God!
subtitles.english: I love you, my God!

subtitles.original: I love you, my boy!
subtitles.english: I love you, my boy!

subtitles.original: ただ落ちていく
subtitles.english: Just falling...

subtitles.original: I love you, my God!
subtitles.english: I love you, my God!

subtitles.original: I love you, my boy!
subtitles.english: I love you, my boy!

subtitles.original: あなたを知って全ては過去になる
subtitles.english: Knowing you, everything becomes the past.

subtitles.original: I love you, my God!
subtitles.english: I love you, my God!

subtitles.original: I love you, my boy!
subtitles.english: I love you, my boy!

subtitles.original: 幸せに満ちた未来を作ろうね
subtitles.english: Let's create a future full of happiness.

subtitles.original: 愛しきって どうかこの僕を
subtitles.english: Love me completely, please, love me.

subtitles.original: 愛しきって どうかこのあたしを
subtitles.english: Love me completely, please, love me.

subtitles.original: 君 君 君 君だ！
subtitles.english: It's you, you, you, you!

subtitles.original: 愛し合ってしまったこの僕ら
subtitles.english: We who ended up loving each other.

subtitles.original: ハッピーエンドに別れを告げ
subtitles.english: Bid farewell to the happy ending.

subtitles.original: 君 君 君 君だ！
subtitles.english: It's you, you, you, you!

subtitles.original: アハ！皆さん、どう思いましたか？
subtitles.english: A-ha! Everyone, what did you think?

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: 楽しかった！イェイイェイイェイ！
subtitles.english: That was fun! Yay yay yay!

subtitles.original: スーパースペシャルゲスト、Syudouさんが来ました！
subtitles.english: Our super special guest, Syudou is here!

subtitles.original: こんにちは！
subtitles.english: Hello!

subtitles.original: Dead Beatsの皆さんこんにちは、Syudouです。
subtitles.english: Hello to all the Dead Beats, I'm Syudou.

subtitles.original: Yes、自己紹介お願いします！
subtitles.english: Yes, please introduce yourself!

subtitles.original: はい、僕はですね、ミュージシャンやってます、Syudouでございます。
subtitles.english: Yes, I'm Syudou, and I'm a musician.

subtitles.original: そしてハッピーバースデー、Calliopeさん！おめでとうございます。
subtitles.english: And happy birthday, Calliope! Congratulations.

subtitles.original: Oh thank you! ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Oh thank you! Thanks!

subtitles.original: ライブも最高です。
subtitles.english: The live is great too.

subtitles.original: あ、ちなみにハイタッチしたいんですが...行きますか？
subtitles.english: Oh, by the way, I want to do a high five... shall we?

subtitles.original: あ、行きますか？
subtitles.english: Oh, shall we?

subtitles.original: はい！せーの！
subtitles.english: Yes! One, two...!

subtitles.original: よいしょ！ヘイ！
subtitles.english: There! Hey!

subtitles.original: いい感じ！ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Feels good! Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: ちなみにSyudouさんは、まぁ音楽活動いろいろやってますね？
subtitles.english: By the way Syudou, you're doing various musical activities, right?

subtitles.original: どのー、どの活動やってますか？
subtitles.english: What- what kind of activities do you do?

subtitles.original: そうですね、僕はボカロPですね。ボカロで楽曲を作ったり...
subtitles.english: Well, I'm a Vocaloid P. I make songs with Vocaloid...

subtitles.original: シンガーソングライターとして歌を歌わせていただいたり...
subtitles.english: ...sing as a singer-songwriter...

subtitles.original: そして色々な方に楽曲を提供させたり、そんな活動をさせて頂いております。
subtitles.english: ...and provide songs to various people. Those are the kinds of activities I do.

subtitles.original: イェイ！まぁもちろんあたし知ってるけど、なんか...大ファンだからね。
subtitles.english: Yay! Well of course I know, since... I'm a big fan.

subtitles.original: 嬉しいです。ライブも以前来ていただきまして。
subtitles.english: I'm happy. You also came to my live before.

subtitles.original: そうですね。武道館ライブめっちゃ楽しかった！
subtitles.english: That's right. The Budokan live was so much fun!

subtitles.original: あーありがとう、本当僕も楽しくて、めちゃくちゃ盛り上がったんで...
subtitles.english: Th- thank you, I also really had fun and it was so hyped...

subtitles.original: 嬉しいです今日出られて。
subtitles.english: ...so I'm happy to be here today.

subtitles.original: こちらこそあたしもすごい嬉しいですね。
subtitles.english: Likewise, I'm very happy too.

subtitles.original: あの...このステージどう思いますか？
subtitles.english: Um... what do you think of this stage?

subtitles.original: ね、これすごいですよね、後ろからこの高さも含めて。
subtitles.english: Right, this is amazing isn't it, including this height from the back.

subtitles.original: 僕ちょっと高い所苦手なんで落ちないように気をつけながらやらないとなと思うんですけど...
subtitles.english: I'm a bit bad with high places so I feel like I have to be careful not to fall...

subtitles.original: 最高ですこれ、はい。
subtitles.english: ...but this is the best, yes.

subtitles.original: まーかなり高いけど気をつけてね。
subtitles.english: It's- quite high but be careful.

subtitles.original: ちょっと高いですよね、下見えないから。やべー、はい。
subtitles.english: It's a bit high isn't it, I can't see the bottom. Crap- yes.

subtitles.original: え、でもそういえばなんかテーマが誕生日だから...
subtitles.english: Oh, but speaking of which, since the theme is birthday...

subtitles.original: ちょっと知りたいね、Syudouさんの誕生日はいつですか？
subtitles.english: ...I want to know a bit, when is your birthday, Syudou?

subtitles.original: 僕の誕生日 9月ですね、September。
subtitles.english: My birthday is in September.

subtitles.original: September！Septemberですね。
subtitles.english: September! It is September.

subtitles.original: お、SeptemberのBirthday Stone、誕生石はサファイアです。
subtitles.english: Oh, the birthday stone for September is sapphire.

subtitles.original: も、ほら、ステージはサファイア、サファイア、サファイアです！
subtitles.english: Look, the stage is sapphire, sapphire, sapphire!

subtitles.original: あ、そういうことだったのこれ、あーなるほど。
subtitles.english: Ah, so that's what it was, ah I see.

subtitles.original: 僕に合わせていただいてありがとう、たまたまですけどあの服もこの青で帽子も青であったんで...
subtitles.english: Thank you for matching it to me, even if by chance my clothes and hat were blue too...

subtitles.original: 相性がいい！
subtitles.english: Good chemistry!

subtitles.original: うわーめっちゃ嬉しいそうですね。ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Wow- I'm very happy. Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: やーすごい、めっちゃいい感じですね。
subtitles.english: Yeah- amazing, it's a very good vibe.

subtitles.original: いいですね、嬉しいです。
subtitles.english: It's good, I'm happy.

subtitles.original: Wow！え、次の曲は...
subtitles.english: Wow! Um, the next song is...

subtitles.original: Syudouさんが書き下ろしてくれたやつですね。
subtitles.english: ...one that Syudou wrote specifically for me.

subtitles.original: そうですね。あの、僕がすごいCalliopeさんのもちろん楽曲大好きなんですけど...
subtitles.english: That's right. Um, I really love Calliope's songs of course, but...

subtitles.original: Calliopeさんのこうかっこよくて、強くて、すごい美しいみたいな所を引き出せるような楽曲として作らせて頂いた曲でございますね。
subtitles.english: ...it's a song I created to bring out Calliope's cool, strong, and beautiful sides.

subtitles.original: はい。
subtitles.english: Yes.

subtitles.original: ありがとう！やーめっちゃいい曲本当に何か大好きな曲だから。
subtitles.english: Thank you! Yeah- it's a really good song, I really love it.

subtitles.original: 嬉しい、ありがとう。
subtitles.english: I'm happy, thank you.

subtitles.original: マジ本当に感謝してます。
subtitles.english: I'm really grateful.

subtitles.original: はいありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Yes, thank you.

subtitles.original: 今回一緒に歌いたいと思います。
subtitles.english: I'd like for us to sing together this time.

subtitles.original: 初めてですね一緒に歌うのはこれはね。
subtitles.english: This is the first time we're singing together.

subtitles.original: 初めてです。なかなかレアなのではないでしょうか。
subtitles.english: It's the first time. Isn't this quite rare?

subtitles.original: 大丈夫ですか？
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: はいありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Yes, thank you.

subtitles.original: Okay、じゃ次の曲に行く前に、皆に伝えたいことありますか？
subtitles.english: Okay, before we go to the next song, is there anything you want to tell everyone?

subtitles.original: はい、えーそうですね、僕こうCalliopeさんと何度かコラボさせて頂いてるんですけど...
subtitles.english: Yes, well, I've collaborated with Calliope several times...

subtitles.original: Dead Beatsの皆さん含め本当にもう温かく迎えて頂いて...
subtitles.english: ...and everyone, including the Dead Beats, has welcomed me so warmly...

subtitles.original: すごい嬉しいです。で今回ライブもこうやってやらせて頂いて...
subtitles.english: ...so I'm very happy. And to be able to do this live too...

subtitles.original: 皆一緒に盛り上がって...！
subtitles.english: ...everyone get hyped together...!
